stemHtml: What is true about the factors affecting human error and reliability?

options.a: External factors that are involved in error generation are limited to weather, traffic, and terrain.
options.b: Internal factors are genetically determined and CANNOT be affected by training.
options.c: External factors determine how an individual will behave and make errors, and this individual response is resistant to change.
options.d: External as well as internal factors can be involved in error generation.
